purpose: Free-only live discoveries for the frontend-components skill. Entries are concrete internet-discovered repositories with verified MIT license evidence and are not known duplicates of registry/internet-ui-templates.json or existing live discovery files.
license_policy: Free-only scan. Do not add paid, Pro, premium, gated, login-required, marketplace-only, subscription-only, trial-only, or unclear-access templates/components. Copy code only when a compatible free/open-source license is verified.

templates.name: MTVerse Free Next.js Admin Dashboard Template
templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + ApexCharts + Prisma/Better Auth stack
templates.skill_usage: Use as a concrete free MIT reference for a modern Next.js 16 admin dashboard with React 19, Tailwind v4, Better Auth, Prisma, Postgres, ApexCharts, ecommerce/CRM/analytics dashboard pages, auth screens, tables, and dark/light operational UI patterns. The package name contains 'pro', but the repository and license are public/MIT; continue to avoid any paid MTVerse assets outside this repository.

templates.name: React Template Admin Ant Design Dashboard
templates.styling: Ant Design 5 + Ant Design Pro Components + Sass
templates.skill_usage: Use as a free MIT Ant Design admin reference for enterprise dashboards with React Router, Ant Design Pro Components, chart panels, form/table-heavy pages, Zustand state patterns, and Vite-based admin project structure.

templates.name: Mantine Analytics Dashboard
templates.styling: Mantine 8 + Mantine DataTable + Recharts + Tabler Icons
templates.skill_usage: Use as a free MIT Mantine dashboard reference for analytics-heavy admin interfaces with Mantine 8 components, DataTable, Recharts, calendars, drag-and-drop, map/chart panels, spotlight search, notifications, modals, rich text pages, and dashboard shell patterns.
